title: Precision
text: You’ve to make sure that your copywriting skills reflect in every word you choose for your ad. Like, “lose your knack for losing things.” That’s a total of five main words.

title: Clarity
text: Use simple, direct words that make messages easy to understand.

title: Brevity
text: Keep sentences brief and to the point.

title: Tone
text: Make sure the tone fits your audience (kids, teens, parents, professionals).

title: Call to Action (CTA)
text: Use action words that include a clear next step (e.g., Buy Now, Learn More, Call Today).

title: Simplicity
text: Come up with a simple design that reflects Apple’s branding. Ensure it's got B&W, same font size, rectangular and circular shapes with rounded edges, and minimalistics icons.

title: Audience
text: Define who’d see this ad to come buy the product at the store or on the website.
